best_unix_strategy: Use a paragraph-aware awk or perl script to capture the exact `### Database Schema` subsection from its heading through the line immediately before `### Database Tables`, delete that source range, and insert the captured block after the `### Data Models` subsection body but before `### Database Schema Exceptions`, leaving the fenced archive note untouched.
rationale: The candidate produced no positive headline gap because mdtools, hybrid, and unix all failed under both scorers. Unix did not mutate the file and left the target subsection under `## Current Architecture`, while the tool-enabled modes preserved the heading tree but still produced block-order and block-text mismatches around the destination placement.
review_notes: The raw reviewer response mislabeled itself as Qwen3.5-27B-4bit and returned an inconsistent `AST-structural` label with `accepted_as_ast_structural: false`; this artifact records the actual local reviewer model and the conservative no-gap disposition.
Because hybrid did not pass, the unix failure class cannot promote this family even though the unix trace itself resembles a structural/planning failure.
